header.title: al-bayan
header.subtitle: construction general
header.description: Your partner in construction, from foundation to finishing. We serve you with expertise and quality in executing all construction and finishing works, backed by a specialized team and complete equipment

services.title: Services
services.description: We blend engineering precision with architectural creativity to deliver projects that stand the test of time. From concept to completion, our team ensures quality, safety, and client satisfaction every step of the way.

civil.title: Civil & Architectural Works
civil.point1: Structural safety through regular inspection and maintenance.
civil.point2: Renovation and modernization of facilities to meet contemporary standards.
civil.point3: Risk assessment to ensure safety and stability.

contracting.title: General Contracting for Buildings
contracting.point1: Project management from inception to delivery.
contracting.point2: Design and construction with a quality that combines functionality and aesthetics.
contracting.point3: Quality control in accordance with local and international standards.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Development
infrastructure.point2: Installation of essential utilities (water, electricity, telecommunications).

construction.title: Construction
construction.subtitle: & Contracting
construction.description: At Construction & Contracting Services, we deliver comprehensive solutions that blend engineering precision, architectural creativity, and execution commitment. Our specialized team transforms your vision into reality — from initial planning to the final finishing touch — all while adhering to the highest global standards of quality.

department.title: Our Departments
department.description: Specialized departments working together to deliver exceptional results.

surveying.title: Surveying Works
surveying.description: At Al-Bayan, our surveying division is equipped with experienced professionals and cutting-edge technology to deliver precise land assessments. Whether it's boundary demarcation, topographic mapping, or site analysis, our team ensures accurate data collection that forms the foundation for successful engineering and construction projects.

concrete.title: Concrete Works
concrete.description: At Al-Bayan, we specialize in high-quality concrete works that serve as the backbone of strong and durable construction. Our services include concrete casting, reinforcement installation, formwork, and surface finishing—all delivered with precision and care. Whether its residential buildings, commercial complexes, or infrastructure projects, our concrete expertise guarantees lasting performance. Using advanced techniques and industry-grade materials, our team ensures every concrete structure meets rigorous standards of safety and durability. We work closely with architects and engineers to deliver customized solutions that align with project requirements and design visions. At Al-Bayan, concrete is not just a material—it's a commitment to excellence from the ground up.

footer.company: Al Bayan Construction General Contracting Est.

projects.name: HVAC works

projects.name: Infrastructure & Sanitation Projects
projects.description: Building sustainable foundations and clean environments for thriving communities.

projects.name: Financial Center Project
projects.description: King Abdullah Financial District: A global investment destination in the heart of Riyadh, blending cutting-edge architecture with smart infrastructure to drive Saudi economic growth

projects.name: Architectural and Civil Works
projects.description: Where architectural creativity meets civil excellence — shaping spaces with purpose and precision

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We strive to provide world-class contracting services, committed to innovation, quality, and sustainability. Our goal is to exceed client expectations through advanced technologies, strong partnerships, and empowering our team to deliver landmark projects. We focus on economic growth, improving community well-being, and actively contributing to Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.description: Our guiding principles shape everything we do—from delivering excellence in our projects to building lasting partnerships. These five values reflect our commitment to integrity, innovation, and impact.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We uphold the highest standards of honesty and transparency in all our actions.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We embrace creativity and seek new ways to improve our services and solutions.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We are committed to delivering excellence in every project we undertake.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We prioritize environmentally responsible practices for a better future.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: We believe in the power of teamwork and strong partnerships.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To lead the future of sustainable construction and set new standards for innovation and excellence. We aim to transform Saudi Arabia's infrastructure in line with Vision 2030, to create a smarter, greener, more prosperous future for all.
